{{- $tpl := templates.Current.Name }} {{- $idx := math.Counter }} {{- warnf "[%04d][ %-20s ] : %s " $idx $tpl .Path }} {{- $opts := dict "targetPath" "/css/huggingface.css" "loaders" (dict ".svg" "dataurl") }} {{- with resources.Get "css/huggingface.css" }} {{- warnf "[%04d][ %-20s ] : %s :: LOAD %s" $idx $tpl $.Path .}} {{- with resources.ExecuteAsTemplate "css/intermediate.css" $ . }} {{- with . | css.Build $opts }} {{- else }} {{- warnf "css.Build for %s failed" . }} {{- end }} {{- else }} {{- warnf "executeAsTemplate for %s failed" . }} {{- end }} {{- else }} {{- warnf "CSS not found: css/huggingface.css" }} {{- end }}
